title: pasania wilsonii
intro: Pasania wilsonii is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Pasania wilsonii include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat. Herbal preparations of Pasania wilsonii can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall health and well-being.
